function.name: _schedule_update_define
function.description: Update existing scheduled task definition. Must explicitly declare the fields to be modified in this update through updateFieldList.

updateFieldList.description: List of fields to be updated in this operation

type.description: Scheduled task type. Can only fill in one of the following values: default (default periodic scheduling), cron (Cron expression scheduling, must provide cron field at the same time).

invokeType.description: Invocation type. Can only fill in one of the following values: automatic (call automation, must provide automaticId at the same time), script (call script, must provide scriptId and scriptFunc at the same time).

schedulePeriod.description: Scheduling period (used when type=default). Can only fill in one of the following values: day (every day), week (every week, with scheduleWeekList), dualweek (every two weeks, with scheduleWeekList), month (every month, with scheduleDayList), interval (by interval, with scheduleInterval).
